APPLE

iPhone 17 Pro On Us.
No trade-in needed.

Get the ultimate Pro when you switch to T-Mobile and bring your number on an Experience More or Experience Beyond plan.

Shop now
With 24 monthly bill credits when you switch to T-Mobile on a qualifying plan. For well-qualified customers; plus taxes & $35 device connection charge.
GET SAVINGS THAT LAST

T-Mobile customers had the lowest wireless bills.

Vs. Verizon and AT&T over the past 5 years.

Switch and save
Based on HarrisX Billing Snapshots.
SWITCH IN 15 MINUTES

Ready to switch to T-Mobile? You’re just 15 minutes to better.

Join in the T-Life app or online, and get our best phone deals with no trade-in needed.

Switch now
SAME-DAY INTERNET

Fast internet, now delivered the fastest.

Powered by DoorDash.
Get the fastest 5G home internet delivered the same day with free DoorDash delivery.

Learn more
Fastest 5G home internet according to Ookla® Speedtest®. Same-day delivery available for most Internet-eligible customers, see if it’s an option during checkout. Plus tax.

If you cancel entire account before receiving 24 credits, credits stop and balance on required finance agreement is due; for phones, contact us. Bill credits end if you pay off device early. For well-qualified customers, plus tax & $35 device connection charge.

GIFTS FOR THE DADS & GRADS

For the dads who teach and the grads who listened.

Find the perfect gift that celebrates everything they’ve accomplished.

Go shopping

Switch in just 15 minutes.

Join how and when you want—right here or in the T-Life app.

No trade-in needed to join the best network.

Keep your phone or score a great deal on a new one when you activate a line. Explore deals.

FREE same-day delivery.

For a limited time, get your new phone, 5G Home Internet, or both delivered for FREE the same day you switch. Check availability at checkout.

Best Mobile Network in the US according to Ookla® Speedtest®. 

Switch in just 15 minutes.

Check out in 15 minutes or less per line. Median check-out time using T-Life app; activation may take longer (e.g., with locked phones). Device activation, data & number transfer will take additional time.

Free Same-Day Delivery

Free Same-Day Delivery: Phone delivery for eligible new accounts. Home Internet delivery for new and existing customers activating an eligible new Home Internet line. For both, see if same-day delivery is an option during checkout. Plus tax. Same-day delivery is not available in all areas and may not be available due to order cutoff times. Weather, traffic, driver availability and safety, and other uncontrollable conditions may affect delivery window.

According to Ookla® Speedtest®. Best: Based on analysis by Ookla® of Speedtest Intelligence® data 2H 2025. Ookla trademarks used under license and reprinted with permission. Fastest: Based on analysis by Ookla® of Speedtest Intelligence® data of national Speed Score results incorporating 5G download and upload speeds for 2H 2025. Ookla trademarks used under license and reprinted with permission.

iPhone 17—Get 4 On Us. Plus, 4 lines for $25/line/mo.

Shop now
More delightful. More durable. Yours when you trade in an eligible phone and add qualifying lines on our Essentials promo plan. With 24 monthly bill credits.
No trade-in needed

Free select smartphones.

Shop now
Yours FREE when you add a line on most plans. Via 24 monthly bill credits.
Low down payment
APPLE

iPhone 15.
Get up to 50% off. 

Shop now
Shop online now and get up to $315 off via 24 monthly bill credits when you add a line on a qualifying plan.
No trade-in needed
SAMSUNG

New Galaxy S26 Ultra for under $200. 

Shop now
Experience the world’s first phone with built-in privacy display. Get it when you activate a line on an Experience More or Experience Beyond plan. With 24 monthly bill credits. 
No trade-in needed
MOTOROLA

New motorola razr On Us. No trade-in needed.

Shop now
Endless ways to capture. Yours when you activate a new line on an Experience More plan. Via 24 monthly bill credits.
Limited-time offer
BRING YOUR OWN DEVICE

Your phone. Your number. Get up to $400 On Us.

Switch now
Get up to $400 when you switch to T-Mobile, bring your own device, and keep your number on an eligible plan. After rebate via virtual prepaid Mastercard. Allow 6-8 weeks.
No trade-in needed
MOTOROLA

Save $1100 on the new motorola razr fold.

Shop now for motorola razr fold.
Set a new fold standard. Get yours when you activate a new line on an Experience Beyond plan. With 24 monthly bill credits.
No trade-in needed.
APPLE

Get the new iPhone 17e On Us.

Shop now
Browse and binge movies for hours on end with an all-day battery life. Get one On Us via 24 monthly bill credits when you switch to T-Mobile and bring your number on most plans. Includes 55+, Military, First Responder Segment plans.
FAMILY FREEDOM

Switch and get up to $800/line to pay off your old phones.

Check it out
When you trade & upgrade up to 4 phones. Via virtual prepaid card. New device, qualifying credit, service, eligible trade-in & port required. Card typically takes 15 days.
No trade-in needed

Get the Pixel 10 On Us.

Do spectacular, on the regular. Yours when you activate a line on most plans.

Shop now
Existing Go5G members also qualify. Via 24 monthly bill credits.

If you cancel entire account before receiving 24 credits, credits stop and balance on required finance agreement is due; for phones, contact us. Bill credits end if you pay off device early. For well-qualified customers, plus tax & $35 device connection charge.

Smartwatch deals.

APPLE

Save up to $300 on a new Apple Watch Series 11.

Shop now
The ultimate way to watch your health. For a limited time, enjoy up to $300 off when you add a watch line on Watch Plan Plus.
APPLE

Get Apple Watch SE 3 On Us.

Shop now
Packed with essentials like sleep score, Always-On display, Activity rings, and more. For a limited time, save up to $300.00 on Apple Watch SE 3 40mm when you add a watch line on Watch Plan Plus.
SAMSUNG

Get up to $400 off select Samsung watches.

Shop now
Whether you’re focused on productivity, health or performance Samsung has a Galaxy Watch for you. Now get up to $400 off via 24 monthly bill credits when you add a line on an eligible wearable plan.
SAMSUNG

Get Galaxy Watch8 40mm On Us.

Shop now
More than a watch – it’s a health coach and tracker that fits your wrist and lifestyle. Get one On Us via 24 monthly bill credits when you add a line on an eligible wearable plan.
GOOGLE

Get up to $400 off Pixel Watch 4.

Shop now
Precision crafted. Performance ready. With 24 monthly bill credits when you add a qualifying watch line.
Kid-friendly in so many ways
APPLE 

Apple Watch For Your Kids.

Find out more
Rest easy knowing you can call, text, or check your kids’ location with Apple Watch.
Now kid-ready
SAMSUNG

Made for kids and your peace of mind.

Find out more
Galaxy Watch8 for Kids is loaded with features that give parents valuable ways to help guide kids safely into the digital world.

LINKPORT MOBILE INTERNET STICK

Stay connected on the go with Linkport.

SYNCUP DRIVE®

Keep tabs on your car and your crew.

Shop now
Get SyncUp DRIVE® for FREE via 24 monthly bill credits when you add a qualifying line. Enjoy real-time alerts, in-car Wi-Fi, and peace of mind when you’re on the go. Requires capable phone & app for some features.

MAGENTA STATUS

Magenta Status

FREE TRIAL

Free trial

Hello! Want to stay logged in?

To keep your accounts safe, you'll be automatically logged out in: 

Share your screen while on a call or in store

Get guided support from an Expert in real time

  • For your security, personal info, tabs, and notifications are automatically hidden.
  • You can stop screen sharing at any time.
  • Experts can only see what’s on T-Mobile.com.
  • Don’t use screen share while driving or in any situation where it's unsafe to focus on your screen.

By clicking 'Accept and continue,' you are consenting to allow the Expert to view your screen for assisted navigation. This session may be recorded. To learn more, please visit the  T-Mobile Privacy Notice.

Next: Generate a code to share with your Expert

Share this code with your Expert

code

Once your code has been successfully entered by your Expert, this window will close and continue to the session.

Allow screen sharing with your Expert?

Personal and sensitive data is hidden for your security and privacy.

End your session?

Ending your session will stop sharing your screen, but will not end your call.

Your session has ended

Your screen is no longer being shared with your Expert.

You are already in an active session

Your code has expired

Generate a new one to share with your Expert.
